positive: A hyper-detailed, symmetrical, central composition featuring a stylized mythical creature, perhaps a griffin or a chimera, rendered in a minimalist, geometric stained-glass art style. The creature is depicted in profile, perched on stylized architectural ruins. The color palette should utilize deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, burnt orange, and aged gold, giving it a rich, regal contrast. Focus on bold, defined silhouettes and clean, heavy linework that suggests woodcut or stencil printing. The background should be simple and ethereal, allowing the main subject to pop with contrast. High contrast, graphic novel quality, vector illustration look, centered on a white or cream background.
negative: photorealistic, blur, grainy, watermark, signature, logo, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, low detail, sketch, gradient, messy, messy background
